No custom nav items yet. Click \"Add ite: No custom nav items yet. Click "Add item" to create one.
Append a custom link to the top navigati: Append a custom link to the top navigation bar. Internal paths start with /, external URLs start with http(s)://
URL must start with / or http(s)://: URL must start with / or http(s)://
Existence ratio (number applied when the: Existence ratio (number applied when the field is present)
Each rule needs a source and an out_key.
These are global wildcard rules (batch /: These are global wildcard rules (batch / fallback). To configure a single model precisely, edit that model and use its Parameter-based pricing section.
Charge extra for this model based on req: Charge extra for this model based on request parameters (e.g. larger size, hd quality, longer duration). Rules here apply only to this model and require the global SKU switch (Billing settings) to be on.
Which models this rule applies to. Exact: Which models this rule applies to. Exact names or wildcards, e.g. gpt-image-1, sora*, veo*.
The request field to read. Image: size /: The request field to read. Image: size / quality / background. Video: size / duration / mode / input_reference, or metadata.* for custom fields.
How the value becomes a multiplier. Tier: How the value becomes a multiplier. Tier: numeric brackets (size/duration). Enum: discrete mapping (quality/mode). Exists: surcharge when the field is present.
Name shown on the bill and used to stack: Name shown on the bill and used to stack multipliers. Use a sku_ prefix. Cannot be n / seconds / duration.
How to turn the value into a number. lon: How to turn the value into a number. long_edge: longest side of size. megapixels: width*height. number/seconds: parse directly.
Each bracket: the derived value <= up_to: Each bracket: the derived value <= up_to gets that multiplier. Set up_to = 0 for the no-upper-bound catch-all (put it last).
Map each parameter value to a multiplier: Map each parameter value to a multiplier, e.g. standard -> 1, hd -> 2. Values not listed are not surcharged (x1).
Multiplier applied when the field is pre: Multiplier applied when the field is present / true (e.g. image-to-video, with-audio). Otherwise x1.
